name: Maine
why_ruby_pro: Maine BABLO compliance for licensed beer and wine distributors
Maine Revised Statutes Title 28-A excise reporting built in
Handles Maine's control-state spirits environment alongside open-market distribution
problem: BABLO license requirements tracked in spreadsheets, not your ERP
Title 28-A excise calculations assembled manually each quarter
Control-state product restrictions enforced inconsistently across routes
difference: BABLO license validation on every account before order acceptance
Title 28-A excise rates applied automatically per product and category
Clear separation of control-state and licensed distributor product lines
how_it_works: Accounts store BABLO license type and expiry with auto-renewal alerts
Excise totals roll up by period for one-click Maine BABLO export
Route analytics show account health and profitability across all Maine territories
